mapper.select: SELECT * FROM action_definition WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = FALSE)
SELECT * FROM action_definition WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND entity_id = #{entityId} AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = FALSE)
SELECT * FROM action_definition WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND domain = #{domain} AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = FALSE)
